common.noPermission: You don't have permission to perform this action
common.noEditPermission: You don't have permission to edit settings. Contact your administrator for access.
common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

app.noNewsDesc: Updates and bulletins will appear here.
app.reportIncidentDesc: Spot something unsafe? Let the team know right away.
app.requestFixDesc: Report broken equipment or request maintenance.
app.browseAssetsDesc: Look up equipment, scan QR codes, or check status.
app.newsDesc: Stay up to date with company safety news and policies.

report.title: Report incident

success.title: Report submitted!
success.description: Your report has been submitted successfully. The safety team will review it shortly.
success.incidentDescription: Your incident report has been filed. The safety team will investigate and follow up.
success.checklistDescription: Your checklist has been completed and recorded. Great job staying on top of safety tasks!
success.inspectionDescription: Your inspection has been submitted. Results are now available for review.
success.assessmentDescription: Your risk assessment has been completed and logged for compliance records.
success.saveForRecords: Save this number for your records
success.reportSubmittedDesc: Your incident report has been submitted successfully and is being reviewed.
success.checklistCompletedDesc: Your checklist has been submitted successfully. Great work staying safe!
success.inspectionSubmittedDesc: Your asset inspection has been submitted successfully and is being reviewed.
success.assessmentSubmittedDesc: Your risk assessment has been submitted successfully and is being reviewed.

report.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Slip and fall near loading dock
report.titleHint: A brief, clear title helps identify this incident
report.descriptionPlaceholder:
Describe what happened in detail. Include:
• What occurred
• Who was involved
• Any injuries or damage
• Witnesses present
report.lostTime: Did this result in lost time?
report.lostTimeDesc: Was work stopped or someone unable to work?
report.locationOptionalHint: Location is optional but helps with investigation
report.timeEstimateHint: If you are unsure of the exact time, provide your best estimate
report.photosOptional: Photos are optional. You can add up to 4 photos (max 10MB each)

profile.newIncidentsDesc: Alert when new incidents are reported
profile.twoFactorDesc: Add extra security to your account
profile.photoTooLarge: Image too large. Max size is 2MB.
profile.offlineDesc: Some features require an internet connection
profile.notif_incidents_desc: Alert when new incidents are reported

companies.appNameHelp: The name employees see in the app header. Defaults to company name.
companies.defaultLanguageHelp: The default UI language for new users in this company.

errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
errors.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Please check the URL or navigate back.
errors.networkErrorDesc: Please check your internet connection and try again. Your unsaved changes are preserved locally.
errors.accessDeniedDesc: You don't have permission to view this content. Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.
errors.sessionExpiredDesc: Your session has expired for security. Please sign in again to continue.
errors.dataLoadFailedDesc: We had trouble loading this information. This could be a temporary issue.
errors.saveFailedDesc: Your changes couldn't be saved. They've been kept locally, try again in a moment.
errors.timeoutDesc: The server is taking too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.rateLimitedDesc: You're making requests too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.maintenanceDesc: We're performing scheduled maintenance. The platform will be back shortly.
errors.offlineReadyDesc: Some features are available offline. Your changes will sync when you're back online.

kpi.downtimeHoursDesc: Total hours this asset was out of service

users.searchByNameEmailId: Search by name, email, or employee ID...

users.noMembersYet: No members in this team yet
users.deleteTeamConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
users.deleteTeamWarning: Warning: This team has {count} member(s) who will be removed from the team.
users.basicDetails: Basic details for the user account
users.additionalTeamsLater: Users can be added to additional teams later
users.createInviteDesc: Create a new user account and send an invitation
users.roleDescription: Role determines base permissions. Custom permissions can be added below.
users.employeeDesc: Basic access: View own incidents, complete checklists
users.managerDesc: Team access: Manage team incidents, view team reports, assign work
users.adminDesc: Full access: All features, user management, settings
users.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
users.activeSessionsDesc: Manage devices where this account is logged in
users.deleteUserConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All their data will be permanently removed.

locations.selectLocationDesc: Click on a location in the tree to view details
locations.deleteLocationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
locations.deleteLocationWarning: Warning: This will also delete {count} sub-location(s).
locations.name: Name
locations.locationNotFoundDesc: This QR code may be invalid or the location has been removed.
locations.reportIncidentDesc: Report a safety incident at this location
locations.completeChecklistDesc: Start a safety checklist or inspection

labels.photoNotAvailable: Photo upload available in mobile app
labels.readyToSubmit: All required items answered. Ready to submit.
labels.signatureNotAvailable: Signature capture available in mobile app

validation.requiredFields: Please answer all required questions before submitting.

placeholders.description: Short description for this QR code

maintenance.title: Request Maintenance
maintenance.submitWorkOrder: Submit a work order for repair or service

settings.title: Settings
settings.countryDesc: Select your operating country to align safety regulations and recommended templates
settings.usRegulations: Your checklist template library will use US references such as OSHA, NFPA, and FDA.
settings.gbRegulations: Your checklist template library will use UK references such as HSE, RIDDOR, COSHH, and PUWER.
settings.nlRegulations: Your checklist template library will use Dutch references such as Arbowet, RI&E, and NEN 3140.
settings.seRegulations: Your checklist template library will use Swedish references such as AFS, SAM, and ESA.
settings.deRegulations: Your checklist template library will use German references such as ArbSchG, BetrSichV, and DGUV.
settings.frRegulations: Your checklist template library will use French references such as Code du travail, DUERP, and CACES.
settings.esRegulations: Your checklist template library will use Spanish references such as Ley 31/1995, PRL, and RD 1215/1997.
settings.customizeLook: Customize the look of your company portal
settings.configureNotifications: Configure email and push notification settings
settings.criticalAlertsDesc: Notify admins immediately for critical severity incidents
settings.newIncidentReportsDesc: Get notified when new incidents are reported
settings.dailyDigestDesc: Summary of daily activity sent to managers
settings.maintenanceAlertsDesc: Get notified about upcoming and overdue maintenance
settings.ssoDesc: Enable SSO with your identity provider
settings.sessionPasswordDesc: Configure session timeout and password policies
settings.securityDemoMessage: Security settings are for demonstration only. In production, these would integrate with your identity provider.
settings.billingDemoMessage: Billing information shown is for demonstration purposes. No actual charges will be made.
settings.platformSecurityDemoMessage: Platform security settings are for demonstration only. In production, these would enforce actual security policies.

newsApp.title: News & Updates
newsApp.stayInformed: Stay informed about company news and policies
newsApp.nextStepsDesc: Please review this information and acknowledge that you have read and understood the content. If you need any clarification, don't hesitate to contact the safety team.

scan.title: Scan Asset
scan.notFoundDesc: No asset matches that code. Check the code and try again, or register it as a new asset.
scan.demoHint: Tap an asset tag to simulate scanning
scan.manualEntryDesc: Enter an asset tag, serial number, or QR code to look it up.
scan.enterAssetCode: Asset tag, serial number, or QR code...

newAsset.title: Register Asset
newAsset.basicInfoDesc: What type of asset are you registering?
newAsset.safetyInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g., PPE required, certified operators only...
newAsset.reviewDesc: Confirm the details below are correct.
newAsset.qrCodeDesc: A scannable QR code will be created for this asset.

inspectionRounds.title: Rounds
inspectionRounds.noRoutesDesc: Your admin will create inspection routes for you.
inspectionRounds.outOfRange: Value is out of acceptable range, alert will be created
inspectionRounds.routeNotFoundDesc: This inspection route could not be loaded.

riskAssessment.jsaNote: JSA is a simplified daily safety analysis. Complete this at the start of each shift before beginning work.
riskAssessment.identifyHazards: Identify hazards specific to today's work
riskAssessment.crewAcknowledgmentDesc: All crew members have participated in this JSA briefing, understand the hazards and control measures, and are prepared to perform the work safely.
riskAssessment.jsaComplianceNote: This JSA will be recorded for compliance purposes. If conditions change during the shift, a new JSA should be completed.
riskAssessment.notFoundDesc: The requested risk assessment template could not be found.
riskAssessment.submissionNotFoundDesc: The requested risk assessment submission could not be found.
riskAssessment.workerHubHint: Resume drafts, track assessments awaiting review, and keep reviewed proof close at hand.
riskAssessment.completedHint: Reviewed assessments will appear here with the reviewer and date for proof.

onboarding.addLocationDesc: Set up the physical locations your team works at
onboarding.createChecklistDesc: Build inspection templates for your team
onboarding.customizeSettingsDesc: Brand your workspace and set preferences

invite.title: You've Been Invited
invite.expiredDescription: The invitation link you followed is no longer valid. Please ask the person who invited you to send a new invitation.
invite.invalidDescription: This invitation link is not valid. Please check the link and try again, or contact your administrator.
invite.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted
invite.alreadyAcceptedDescription: This invitation has already been used. You can sign in to your account.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

notifications.empty_description: You're all caught up! Notifications about tasks, news, and incidents will appear here.

auth.signupUnavailable: Sign up is not yet available
auth.signupUnavailableDesc: Harmoniq is currently in private access. To get started, please contact your company administrator or reach out to our team for an invitation.

emptyState.noResultsFilterDesc: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria to find what you're looking for.
emptyState.noResultsSearchDesc: No items match your search. Try a different search term.
emptyState.offlineDesc: This content isn't available offline. Connect to the internet and try again.
emptyState.loadFailedDesc: Something went wrong while fetching the data. Please try again.

_ui.activateConfirm: This will create a new checklist from this template. You can edit it before publishing to your team.
_ui.activatedSuccess: Template activated. You can now edit and publish it.
_ui.publishConfirm: This checklist will become visible to field workers in the mobile app.
_ui.unpublishConfirm: This will remove the checklist from the mobile app. Existing submissions will be kept.

construction.name: Construction
construction.description: Safety checklists for construction sites, covering fall protection, scaffolding, excavation, and heavy equipment operations

jha.name: Job Hazard Analysis (JHA)
jha.description: Systematic process to identify workplace hazards before each task, assess risk severity, and establish control measures for worker protection

items.task_description: Describe the task to be performed
items.step_sequence: List the steps in the correct sequence
items.risk_severity: Rate the severity of identified risks (1-5)
items.control_measures: Describe control measures for each hazard
items.ppe_required: All required PPE has been identified and is available
items.responsible_person: Name of the responsible person for this task
items.workers_briefed: All workers have been briefed on the hazards and controls

fall_protection.name: Fall Protection Audit
fall_protection.description: Comprehensive inspection of fall protection systems including guardrails, harnesses, anchor points, and safety nets to ensure compliance with height safety regulations

items.guardrail_integrity: Guardrails are intact and properly secured
items.harness_webbing: Harness webbing is free of cuts, fraying, or damage
items.harness_d_ring: D-ring is not bent, cracked, or corroded
items.harness_stitching: All stitching is intact with no pulled threads
items.anchor_point_rating: Anchor point is rated for the required load capacity
items.safety_net_condition: Safety nets are properly positioned and in good condition
items.hole_covers_secured: All floor/roof hole covers are secured and labeled
items.ladder_tie_off: Ladders are properly tied off or secured at the top

scaffold.name: Scaffold Inspection
scaffold.description: Detailed inspection of scaffold structures for structural integrity, proper assembly, and compliance with safety standards before each use

items.base_plate_mudsill: Base plates and mudsills are in good condition
items.cross_bracing: Cross-bracing is secure and properly installed
items.planking_complete: Planking is complete with no gaps greater than 1 inch
items.toe_boards: Toe boards are in place on all open sides
items.weather_damage: No visible weather damage to scaffold components

toolbox_talk.name: Toolbox Talk Record
toolbox_talk.description: Documentation of daily safety briefings conducted on-site, including the topic covered, attendees, and any follow-up actions identified

items.topic_covered: Topic discussed during the toolbox talk
items.attendees_signed: All attendees have signed the attendance sheet
items.questions_raised: Questions or concerns raised during the talk

excavation.name: Excavation/Trenching Inspection
excavation.description: Safety inspection for excavation and trenching work, verifying soil classification, protective systems, and safe access before workers enter the trench

items.shoring_adequate: Shoring or sloping is adequate for the depth
items.spoil_pile_distance: Spoil pile is at least 2 feet from the trench edge
items.water_accumulation: No hazardous water accumulation in the trench
items.egress_points: Egress points are available every 25 feet
items.utilities_marked: All underground utilities have been located and marked

crane.name: Crane/Hoist Pre-Operation
crane.description: Pre-operation safety check for cranes and hoisting equipment, verifying mechanical condition, operator qualifications, and lift plan readiness

items.wire_rope_condition: Wire rope is free of kinks, bird-caging, and broken strands
items.outriggers_deployed: Outriggers are fully extended and on solid ground
items.load_chart_available: Load chart is available and legible in the cab
items.swing_radius: Swing radius is barricaded and clear of personnel
items.operator_certification: Operator certification is current and valid

manufacturing.name: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Safety checklists for manufacturing facilities, covering lockout/tagout, machine guarding, ergonomics, and production floor safety

loto.name: Lockout/Tagout Verification
loto.description: Verification checklist for lockout/tagout procedures to confirm hazardous energy sources are properly isolated before servicing or maintenance work

items.machine_identified: Machine or equipment has been properly identified
items.energy_sources_listed: All energy sources have been identified and listed
items.isolation_devices: Isolation devices have been applied to all energy sources
items.stored_energy_released: All stored or residual energy has been released
items.verification_attempted: Verification of isolation has been attempted
items.authorized_employee: Authorized employee has signed off on the lockout
items.tags_attached: Lockout/tagout tags are properly attached and legible

machine_guarding.name: Machine Guarding Inspection
machine_guarding.description: Inspection of machine guarding systems to verify guards are in place, interlocks are functioning, and emergency stops are accessible and tested

items.point_of_operation: Point-of-operation guards are in place and secure
items.emergency_stop: Emergency stop button is accessible and tested
items.light_curtain: Light curtain alignment is correct (if applicable)
items.guard_mounting: Guard mounting hardware is tight and secure
items.no_bypass: No bypass devices are present on safety systems
items.warning_labels: Warning labels are visible and legible

ergonomic.name: Ergonomic Assessment
ergonomic.description: Workstation ergonomic evaluation to identify repetitive motion risks, awkward postures, and force requirements, with recommendations for improvement

items.repetitive_motion: Repetitive motion frequency has been assessed
items.force_requirements: Force requirements are within acceptable limits
items.awkward_postures: Awkward postures have been identified and documented
items.workstation_height: Workstation height is appropriate for the worker
items.rest_breaks: Adequate rest break schedule is in place

forklift.name: Forklift Daily Pre-Use
forklift.description: Daily pre-use inspection for forklifts and powered industrial trucks, verifying mechanical systems, safety devices, and operator readiness

items.tires_wheels: Tires and wheels are in good condition
items.forks_condition: Forks are free of cracks, bends, or excessive wear
items.hydraulic_lines: Hydraulic lines show no leaks or damage
items.lights_working: All lights are functioning (headlights, tail, strobe)
items.brakes_tested: Brakes have been tested and are responsive
items.battery_fuel: Battery charge or fuel level is adequate
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is mounted and charged

chemical_spill.name: Chemical Spill Response Readiness
chemical_spill.description: Readiness assessment for chemical spill response, verifying spill kit contents, emergency equipment, PPE availability, and evacuation route accessibility

items.spill_kit_location: Spill kit location is known and accessible
items.spill_kit_contents: Spill kit contents are complete and not expired
items.sds_binder: SDS binder is current and accessible
items.eyewash_tested: Eyewash station has been tested (weekly flush)
items.ppe_available: Required PPE for spill response is available
items.evacuation_route: Evacuation route is clear and marked

safety_walk.name: Production Floor Safety Walk
safety_walk.description: General safety walkthrough of the production floor to assess housekeeping, PPE compliance, emergency equipment readiness, and overall safety conditions

items.aisles_clear: Aisles and walkways are clear and unobstructed
items.ppe_compliance: All workers are wearing required PPE
items.housekeeping: Housekeeping is acceptable throughout the area
items.emergency_exits: Emergency exits are unobstructed and marked
items.fire_extinguishers: Fire extinguishers are accessible and inspected
items.noise_levels: Noise levels are within acceptable limits
items.first_aid_kit: First aid kit is stocked and accessible

oil_gas.name: Oil & Gas
oil_gas.description: Safety checklists for oil and gas operations, covering permit-to-work, confined space entry, H2S safety, and well site inspections

ptw.name: Permit-to-Work
ptw.description: Formal authorization process for high-risk work activities, ensuring hazards are identified, controls are in place, and all parties have reviewed the work scope

items.work_description: Work to be performed has been clearly described
items.hazards_identified: All hazards have been identified and documented
items.gas_test_results: Gas test results are within safe limits
items.isolation_verified: Isolation of energy sources has been verified
items.ppe_specified: Required PPE has been specified and is available
items.time_validity: Permit validity period has been set and communicated

confined_space.name: Confined Space Entry
confined_space.description: Entry permit checklist for confined space work, including atmospheric monitoring, ventilation setup, rescue planning, and continuous monitoring requirements

items.atmospheric_lel: LEL reading is below 10% of the lower explosive limit
items.atmospheric_h2s: H2S level is below the action level
items.atmospheric_co: CO level is below the permissible exposure limit
items.ventilation_setup: Ventilation equipment is set up and functioning
items.rescue_plan: Rescue plan has been reviewed and is in place
items.communication_method: Communication method has been established and tested
items.entry_permit_signed: Entry permit has been completed and signed

h2s.name: H2S Safety Check
h2s.description: Pre-work safety verification for areas with potential hydrogen sulfide exposure, covering personal monitors, breathing apparatus, and buddy system protocols

items.personal_monitor: Personal H2S monitor is calibrated and functioning
items.wind_sock: Wind sock or direction indicator is visible
items.muster_points: Muster points have been identified and communicated
items.scba_staged: SCBA equipment is staged and ready for use
items.buddy_system: Buddy system is confirmed and in effect
items.h2s_training: H2S training is current for all personnel on site
items.alarm_threshold: Alarm threshold is set at 10 ppm

hot_work.name: Hot Work Permit
hot_work.description: Safety checklist for hot work activities such as welding, cutting, or grinding in areas where fire or explosion hazards may exist

items.fire_watch: Fire watch has been assigned and is in position
items.radius_cleared: Area within 35 feet has been cleared of combustibles
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is staged within reach
items.post_work_watch: Post-work 30-minute fire watch has been scheduled
items.hot_work_area: Hot work area has been properly designated

well_site.name: Well Site Inspection
well_site.description: Routine inspection of well site operations and equipment, covering blowout preventer function, flowline integrity, containment, and emergency readiness

items.flowline_integrity: Flowlines are intact with no visible leaks
items.tank_levels: Tank levels are within acceptable range
items.signage_visible: Required signage is visible and legible
items.emergency_equipment: Emergency equipment is accessible and functional

contractor.name: Contractor Orientation
contractor.description: Safety orientation checklist for contractors entering the site, verifying induction completion, hazard awareness, PPE, and required documentation

items.ppe_verified: PPE has been provided and verified

healthcare.name: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Safety checklists for healthcare facilities, covering infection control, sharps disposal, patient safety, and emergency equipment readiness

infection_control.name: Infection Control Round
infection_control.description: Routine infection prevention round to verify hand hygiene availability, PPE supply, isolation protocols, and surface disinfection compliance

items.hand_hygiene_stations: Hand hygiene stations are stocked with soap and sanitizer
items.ppe_supply: PPE supply is adequate for the unit
items.isolation_signage: Isolation signage is correct and in place
items.sharps_containers: Sharps containers are not overfull (below 3/4 line)
items.surface_disinfection: Surface disinfection schedule is being followed
items.patient_placement: Patient placement is appropriate for infection status

sharps.name: Sharps Disposal Audit
sharps.description: Audit of sharps disposal practices and container management to ensure safe handling and regulatory compliance across clinical areas

items.container_fill_level: Container fill level is below the 3/4 line
items.no_protruding_items: No items are protruding from the container
items.label_visible: Container label is visible and legible
items.needle_free_systems: Needle-free systems are in use where applicable

patient_safety.name: Patient Safety Round
patient_safety.description: Bedside safety round to verify patient identification, fall risk assessment, medication verification, and care plan currency

items.bed_rails: Bed rails are appropriate for patient needs
items.call_bell: Call bell is within patient reach
items.fall_risk: Fall risk has been assessed and documented
items.id_band: Patient identification band is present and correct
items.care_plan: Care plan is current and updated

emergency_equip.name: Emergency Equipment Check
emergency_equip.description: Inspection of clinical emergency equipment including crash carts, defibrillators, suction devices, and emergency medications for readiness

items.crash_cart_sealed: Crash cart is sealed with tamper indicator intact
items.defibrillator: Defibrillator is charged and self-test passed
items.resuscitation_bag: Resuscitation bag and mask are intact

hand_hygiene.name: Hand Hygiene Observation
hand_hygiene.description: Direct observation audit of hand hygiene compliance based on the WHO five moments, documenting technique and compliance rates

items.before_patient: Hand hygiene performed before patient contact
items.after_patient: Hand hygiene performed after patient contact
items.after_surroundings: Hand hygiene performed after touching patient surroundings
items.before_clean_procedure: Hand hygiene performed before clean or aseptic procedure
items.after_body_fluid: Hand hygiene performed after body fluid exposure

fire_life.name: Fire/Life Safety Walk
fire_life.description: Facility walkthrough to verify fire and life safety compliance, including exit signage, fire doors, corridor clearance, and detector functionality

items.exit_signs: Exit signs are illuminated and visible
items.corridors_clear: Corridors are clear of equipment and obstructions
items.extinguishers: Fire extinguishers are inspected and accessible
items.smoke_detectors: Smoke detectors are tested and functional
items.evacuation_plan: Evacuation plan is posted and current

warehousing.name: Warehousing
warehousing.description: Safety checklists for warehouse operations, covering forklift inspections, dock safety, fire protection, and pedestrian zone management

forklift.name: Forklift Daily Pre-Use
forklift.description: Daily pre-use inspection for warehouse forklifts, covering mechanical condition, safety features, and operator certification verification

items.tires_wheels: Tires and wheels are in good condition
items.forks_condition: Forks are free of cracks, bends, or excessive wear
items.hydraulic_lines: Hydraulic lines show no leaks or damage
items.brakes_tested: Brakes have been tested and are responsive
items.battery_fuel: Battery charge or fuel level is adequate
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is mounted and charged
items.operator_cert: Operator certification is on file and current

dock.name: Dock Safety Check
dock.description: Pre-loading safety check for dock operations, verifying dock plates, wheel chocks, trailer securement, and lighting conditions

items.dock_plate: Dock plate or board is in good condition
items.wheel_chocks: Wheel chocks are in place and secure
items.gap_check: No hazardous gap between trailer and dock

fire_extinguisher.name: Fire Extinguisher Monthly
fire_extinguisher.description: Monthly visual inspection of fire extinguishers to verify accessibility, charge status, physical condition, and inspection tag currency

items.accessible: Fire extinguisher is not blocked and is accessible
items.charge_gauge: Charge gauge is in the green zone
items.no_damage: No visible damage to the extinguisher body
items.inspection_tag: Inspection tag is current and signed
items.correct_type: Extinguisher type is correct for the area hazards

rack.name: Rack Integrity Audit
rack.description: Structural integrity audit of warehouse racking systems, checking for damage, proper anchoring, load capacity compliance, and connector security

items.upright_damage: Uprights are free of dents, bowing, or twisting
items.beam_connectors: Beam connector locks are in place
items.load_capacity: Load capacity labels are posted and visible
items.overloading: No evidence of overloading beyond rated capacity
items.wire_decking: Wire decking is in good condition (if applicable)

pedestrian.name: Pedestrian Safety Zone Check
pedestrian.description: Inspection of pedestrian safety zones within the warehouse, verifying floor markings, barriers, mirrors, and separation between foot and vehicle traffic

items.floor_markings: Floor markings are visible and not worn
items.barriers_intact: Barriers are intact and properly positioned
items.blind_corner_mirrors: Mirrors are in place at blind corners
items.speed_limit_signs: Speed limit signs are posted and visible
items.separate_paths: Separate travel paths exist for pedestrians and vehicles

receiving.name: Receiving Dock Safety Walk
receiving.description: Safety walk of the receiving dock area to assess spill cleanup, slip hazards, lighting, PPE compliance, and safe handling practices

items.spills_cleaned: All spills have been cleaned up
items.slip_hazards: No slip or trip hazards identified
items.lighting_working: All lighting in the receiving area is working
items.ppe_compliance: Workers are wearing required PPE (steel toes, gloves, vest)
items.box_cutter_safety: Box cutters are being used safely with retractable blades
items.ergonomic_lifting: Proper lifting techniques are being observed

mining.name: Mining
mining.description: Safety checklists for mining operations, covering strata assessment, ventilation, blasting, mobile equipment, and emergency escape procedures

strata.name: Pre-Shift Strata Assessment
strata.description: Pre-shift assessment of ground conditions including roof stability, rib integrity, pillar condition, and support adequacy before commencing underground work

items.roof_condition: Roof condition is stable with no signs of deterioration
items.rib_stability: Rib walls are stable and not spalling
items.pillar_condition: Support pillars are intact and properly sized
items.scaling_needed: Loose rock has been scaled or is not present
items.water_ingress: Water ingress is controlled or absent

ventilation.name: Ventilation System Check
ventilation.description: Verification of underground ventilation systems including fan operation, air velocity, gas levels, and compliance with the ventilation plan

items.fan_operation: Main ventilation fan is operating correctly
items.air_velocity: Air velocity readings are within required range
items.co_levels: Carbon monoxide levels are within safe limits
items.dust_levels: Dust levels are within permissible exposure limits
items.ventilation_controls: Ventilation doors and curtains are in place
items.air_direction: Air direction is correct per the ventilation plan

blast.name: Blast Area Safety
blast.description: Pre-blast and post-blast safety checklist covering personnel clearance, guard posts, warning signals, and re-entry verification

items.personnel_cleared: All personnel have been cleared from the blast area
items.guard_posts: Guard posts have been established at all access points
items.warning_signals: Warning signals have been given per procedure
items.blast_pattern: Blast pattern has been verified by the shot firer
items.reentry_time: Re-entry waiting time has been observed

ppe.name: PPE Compliance Check
ppe.description: Personal protective equipment compliance inspection for mining personnel, verifying condition and proper use of all required safety gear

items.hard_hat: Hard hat is worn and in good condition
items.safety_glasses: Safety glasses are worn and not scratched or damaged
items.steel_toe_boots: Steel-toe boots are worn and in good condition
items.hearing_protection: Hearing protection is worn in designated areas
items.reflective_vest: Reflective vest is worn and visible
items.cap_lamp: Cap lamp is functioning and fully charged
items.gloves: Appropriate gloves are worn for the task

mobile_equip.name: Mobile Equipment Pre-Op
mobile_equip.description: Pre-operation inspection of mobile mining equipment covering brakes, steering, lights, fire suppression, and roll-over protection systems

items.brakes: Service and parking brakes are functioning
items.lights: All lights are functioning (headlights, tail, clearance)
items.fire_suppression: Fire suppression system is charged and ready

emergency_escape.name: Emergency Escape Drill
emergency_escape.description: Record of emergency escape drill execution, documenting participation, route testing, self-rescuer donning times, and total evacuation performance

items.all_workers: All workers on shift participated in the drill
items.primary_exit: Primary escape route was tested successfully
items.secondary_exit: Secondary escape route was tested successfully
items.refuge_chamber: Refuge chamber was located and inspected

food_beverage.name: Food & Beverage
food_beverage.description: Safety and quality checklists for food and beverage operations, covering HACCP, allergen management, cold chain, sanitation, and employee hygiene

haccp.name: HACCP Inspection
haccp.description: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Point inspection to verify monitoring of critical control points, temperature compliance, and corrective action documentation

items.ccp_monitoring: Critical control points are being monitored per schedule
items.temp_receiving: Receiving temperatures are within acceptable range
items.temp_storage: Storage temperatures are within acceptable range
items.temp_holding: Holding temperatures are within safe range
items.corrective_actions: Corrective actions are documented when deviations occur
items.verification: Verification activities are completed per plan
items.records_reviewed: HACCP records have been reviewed and signed

allergen.name: Allergen Management Audit
allergen.description: Audit of allergen management practices including cleaning verification, label accuracy, ingredient segregation, and staff training compliance

items.cleaning_verified: Cleaning between allergen production runs is verified
items.label_accuracy: Product labels accurately list all allergens
items.ingredient_segregation: Allergenic ingredients are properly segregated in storage
items.shared_equipment: Shared equipment protocols are being followed
items.staff_training: Staff allergen awareness training is current

cold_chain.name: Cold Chain Temperature Log
cold_chain.description: Temperature monitoring log for cold chain integrity, tracking refrigerator, freezer, receiving, and transport temperatures with deviation response

items.freezer_temps: Freezer temperatures are at or below 0F / -18C
items.receiving_temps: Receiving dock product temperatures are within range
items.deviation_response: Temperature deviations have been documented and responded to

sanitation.name: Sanitation Audit
sanitation.description: Facility sanitation audit covering food contact surfaces, floor drains, pest control, hand wash stations, and chemical storage practices

items.food_contact_surfaces: Food contact surfaces are cleaned and sanitized
items.floor_drains: Floor drains are clear and functioning
items.pest_control: Pest control stations are checked and maintained
items.hand_wash_stations: Hand wash stations are stocked (soap, towels, sanitizer)
items.chemical_storage: Cleaning chemicals are properly stored and labeled

hygiene.name: Employee Hygiene Check
hygiene.description: Employee hygiene compliance check for food production areas, verifying uniforms, hair restraints, jewelry policy, wound coverage, and handwashing

items.clean_uniform: Employee is wearing a clean uniform or work clothes
items.hair_restraint: Hair restraint (net, cap, beard cover) is properly worn
items.no_jewelry: No jewelry is worn in the production area
items.wounds_covered: Any cuts or wounds are properly covered
items.illness_reporting: Illness reporting requirements have been communicated
items.glove_use: Gloves are being used and changed appropriately

shipping.name: Shipping/Receiving Inspection
shipping.description: Inspection of incoming and outgoing shipments for food safety, verifying vehicle cleanliness, temperatures, packaging integrity, and lot traceability

items.vehicle_cleanliness: Delivery vehicle is clean and free of contamination
items.temperature_verified: Product temperatures have been verified on arrival
items.packaging_integrity: Packaging is intact with no damage or tampering
items.date_codes: Date codes have been checked and are acceptable
items.rejected_items: Rejected items have been documented and separated
items.lot_traceability: Lot numbers have been recorded for traceability

utilities.name: Utilities
utilities.description: Safety checklists for electrical utility operations, covering arc flash compliance, substation inspections, line clearance, and switching procedures

arc_flash.name: Arc Flash Compliance Check
arc_flash.description: Compliance verification for arc flash hazard management, ensuring incident energy analysis, PPE category matching, and energized work authorization

items.incident_energy: Incident energy level has been determined for the work area
items.ppe_category: PPE category matches the incident energy level
items.approach_boundaries: Approach boundaries are marked and communicated
items.energized_permit: Energized work permit has been obtained
items.buddy_system: Buddy system is in effect for energized work
items.de_energize_eval: De-energize first evaluation has been completed

substation.name: Substation Inspection
substation.description: Routine inspection of electrical substation equipment and infrastructure, covering transformers, breakers, ground grids, and perimeter security

items.transformer_oil: Transformer oil levels are within normal range
items.fence_security: Perimeter fence is secure with no breaches
items.signage_visible: Warning and identification signage is visible
items.vegetation_clearance: Vegetation clearance is maintained around equipment
items.animal_guards: Animal guards are in place and undamaged

vegetation.name: Vegetation Management Audit
vegetation.description: Audit of vegetation management practices along power line corridors, verifying clearance distances, trimming schedules, and environmental compliance

items.trimming_completed: Scheduled tree trimming has been completed
items.endangered_species: Endangered species check has been completed

line_clearance.name: Line Clearance Audit
line_clearance.description: Safety audit for line clearance work on de-energized power lines, verifying isolation, protective grounding, and minimum approach distances

items.line_identified: Line has been identified and confirmed isolated
items.approach_distance: Minimum approach distance is being observed
items.rubber_goods: Rubber goods are tested and within certification date
items.traffic_control: Traffic control is in place where required

switching.name: Switching Procedure
switching.description: Step-by-step switching procedure checklist for electrical distribution systems, ensuring two-person verification, voltage testing, and control center coordination

items.procedure_printed: Step-by-step switching procedure is printed and available
items.scada_notification: SCADA control center has been notified

pole_climbing.name: Pole/Tower Climbing Safety
pole_climbing.description: Pre-climb safety checklist for pole and tower work, verifying fall protection equipment, structure integrity, and rescue device availability

items.fall_protection: Fall protection equipment has been inspected
items.pole_tested: Wood pole has been tested (hammer/bore test)
items.communication: Communication with ground crew has been established

transportation.name: Transportation
transportation.description: Safety checklists for commercial transportation operations, covering vehicle inspections, cargo securement, hours of service, and hazmat transport

pre_trip.name: Pre-Trip Vehicle Inspection
pre_trip.description: Comprehensive pre-trip inspection of commercial vehicles covering tires, brakes, lights, mirrors, coupling devices, and emergency equipment

items.tires: Tires have adequate tread depth and proper inflation
items.brakes_air: Air pressure is adequate and brake system is functional
items.lights_all: All lights are functioning (headlights, tail, markers, turn signals)
items.mirrors: Mirrors are clean, properly adjusted, and undamaged
items.windshield: Windshield is clean with no cracks impairing vision
items.coupling_devices: Coupling devices are secure (fifth wheel, pintle hook)
items.cargo_securement: Cargo securement devices are adequate and in place
items.emergency_equipment: Emergency equipment is present (triangles, fire extinguisher)

driver_scorecard.name: Driver Safety Scorecard
driver_scorecard.description: Periodic driver safety performance review covering inspection pass rates, incident history, hours of service compliance, and training completion

items.inspection_pass_rate: Rate the driver's inspection pass rate for this period
items.incident_history: Document any incidents during the review period
items.hos_compliance: Hours of service compliance has been verified
items.training_completion: Required training modules have been completed

cargo.name: Cargo Securement Check
cargo.description: Cargo securement verification to ensure loads are within weight limits, properly tied down, blocked, and braced before transport

items.weight_limits: Load is within weight limits for the vehicle and route
items.tiedowns_rated: Tie-downs are rated and in adequate quantity
items.header_board: Header board or bulkhead is in good condition
items.load_shift: Load shift check has been performed

hos.name: Hours of Service Compliance
hos.description: Hours of service compliance verification for commercial drivers, checking ELD functionality, available drive time, rest breaks, and exception documentation

items.eld_functioning: Electronic logging device is functioning correctly
items.drive_time: Available drive time is within regulatory limits
items.rest_break: Required rest break has been taken
items.sleeper_berth: Sleeper berth provisions are being followed (if applicable)
items.adverse_conditions: Adverse driving conditions exception documented (if used)

hazmat.name: Hazmat Transport Checklist
hazmat.description: Pre-transport checklist for hazardous materials shipments, verifying shipping papers, placards, packaging integrity, and driver endorsement

items.shipping_papers: Shipping papers are complete and accurate
items.placards_correct: Vehicle placards are correct for the cargo

post_trip.name: Post-Trip Inspection Report
post_trip.description: End-of-trip vehicle inspection documenting defects, brake performance, tire condition, fluid leaks, and cargo area readiness for the next load

items.defects_discovered: Document any defects discovered during the trip
items.brake_performance: Brake performance was satisfactory during the trip
items.tire_condition: Tire condition after the loaded trip is acceptable
items.cargo_area: Cargo area has been cleaned and is ready
items.report_signed: Post-trip inspection report has been signed

education.name: Education
education.description: Safety checklists for educational facilities, covering playground inspections, laboratory safety, emergency drills, and building safety walks

playground.name: Playground Safety Inspection
playground.description: Routine inspection of playground equipment and surfaces to identify hazards, verify age-appropriate design, and ensure fall zone compliance

items.equipment_integrity: Equipment is free of sharp edges, loose bolts, and damage
items.fall_zone_surfacing: Fall zone surfacing is adequate (depth and coverage)
items.drain_covers: Drain covers are secure and flush

lab.name: Laboratory Safety Inspection
lab.description: Safety inspection for educational laboratory spaces, verifying emergency equipment, chemical storage, fume hood operation, and PPE availability

items.eyewash_tested: Eyewash station has been tested and is functional
items.shower_tested: Emergency shower has been tested and is functional
items.fume_hood: Fume hood is functioning and airflow is adequate
items.chemical_storage: Chemicals are properly stored and labeled
items.emergency_shutoffs: Emergency shutoffs are labeled and accessible
items.glassware_disposal: Broken glassware disposal containers are available

emergency_drill.name: Emergency Drill Record
emergency_drill.description: Documentation of emergency drill execution including drill type, evacuation time, headcount reconciliation, and areas for improvement

items.drill_type: Type of drill conducted (fire, lockdown, earthquake, tornado)
items.headcount_reconciled: Headcount was reconciled with attendance records
items.areas_of_delay: Areas of delay or congestion identified
items.special_needs: Special needs accommodations were properly executed

visitor.name: Visitor Management Log
visitor.description: Visitor check-in and tracking log for educational campuses, documenting identification verification, badge issuance, and escort requirements

items.purpose_of_visit: Purpose of visit has been documented

building.name: Building Safety Walk
building.description: Facility safety walkthrough for educational buildings, checking exit signs, fire extinguishers, AED readiness, and general building conditions

items.exit_signs: Exit signs are illuminated and visible
items.fire_extinguishers: Fire extinguishers are inspected and accessible
items.aed_checked: AED has been checked and is ready
items.trip_hazards: No trip hazards in corridors or walkways

bus.name: Bus/Transportation Safety
bus.description: Safety checklist for school bus and student transportation vehicles, covering pre-trip inspections, emergency exits, and student count procedures

items.pre_trip_inspection: Pre-trip vehicle inspection has been completed
items.first_aid_kit: First aid kit is present and stocked
items.emergency_exits: Emergency exits are functional and unobstructed
items.student_count: Student count procedure is in place
items.wheelchair_lift: Wheelchair lift has been tested (if applicable)

airports.name: Airports
airports.description: Safety checklists for airport operations, covering terminal safety, ground support equipment, ramp compliance, fueling operations, and contractor management

escalator.name: Escalator/Elevator Safety
escalator.description: Safety inspection of escalators and elevators in terminal buildings, verifying emergency stops, mechanical alignment, and communication systems

items.comb_plate: Comb plate is intact and aligned
items.handrail_speed: Handrail speed is matched to step speed
items.lighting: Lighting is adequate at approaches and along the unit
items.intercom: Intercom or emergency communication is working

terminal_floor.name: Terminal Floor Hazard Walk
terminal_floor.description: Walkthrough of terminal floor areas to identify wet floor conditions, trip hazards, construction barriers, and crowd flow concerns

items.wet_floor_signage: Wet floor areas are identified with proper signage
items.spill_cleanup: Spills have been cleaned up promptly
items.trip_hazards: No trip hazards (torn carpet, uneven tiles) are present
items.construction_barriers: Construction barriers are secure and visible
items.lighting_functional: All lighting in the terminal area is functional
items.crowd_flow: Crowd flow is adequate and not creating safety hazards

aed.name: AED/First Aid Station Check
aed.description: Inspection of automated external defibrillators and first aid stations in the terminal, verifying readiness, supply levels, and trained responder availability

items.aed_powered: AED is powered on and showing ready status
items.trained_responder: Nearest trained responder is listed and on duty

emergency_evac.name: Emergency Evacuation Readiness
emergency_evac.description: Readiness assessment for terminal emergency evacuation, verifying exit signage, route clearance, PA system functionality, and staff assignment awareness

items.exit_signage: Exit signage is illuminated throughout the terminal
items.pa_system: PA system has been tested and is functional
items.assembly_points: Assembly points are marked and communicated
items.wheelchair_chairs: Wheelchair evacuation chairs are staged at stairwells

gse.name: GSE Pre-Use
gse.description: Pre-use inspection of ground support equipment including belt loaders, tugs, and baggage carts, verifying mechanical condition and operator certification

items.belt_loader: Belt loader operation is smooth and controlled
items.tug_brakes_lights: Tug brakes and lights are functioning
items.fuel_level: Fuel level is adequate for the shift
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is mounted and charged

fod.name: FOD Walk
fod.description: Foreign object debris inspection of ramp and apron areas, verifying surface cleanliness, tool accountability, and debris documentation

items.ramp_clear: Ramp area is clear of foreign object debris
items.tools_accounted: All tools and equipment are accounted for
items.loose_items: Loose items have been secured or removed
items.fod_bins: FOD collection bins are available and not full
items.surface_condition: Surface condition is safe (no ice, standing water)
items.debris_documented: Any debris found has been documented and removed

fueling.name: Fueling Operation Safety
fueling.description: Safety checklist for aircraft fueling operations, covering bonding/grounding, spill containment, ignition source control, and fuel quality verification

items.bonding_grounding: Bonding and grounding connections are established
items.no_ignition_sources: No ignition sources are present in the fueling zone
items.fuel_sample: Fuel sample is clear and uncontaminated
items.quantity_verified: Fuel quantity has been verified against the order

baggage.name: Baggage Handling System Audit
baggage.description: Safety audit of baggage handling systems, verifying conveyor guarding, emergency stops, pinch point markings, and ergonomic lifting aid availability

items.conveyor_guarding: Conveyor belt guards are in place
items.emergency_stops: Emergency stop buttons are accessible and tested
items.lighting: Lighting in the baggage handling area is adequate
items.maintenance_access: Maintenance access areas are properly secured
items.noise_levels: Noise levels are within acceptable limits

ramp.name: Ramp Safety Zone Compliance
ramp.description: Compliance check of ramp safety zones, verifying jet blast clearance, equipment marshalling, vehicle speed limits, and PPE usage by ramp personnel

items.jet_blast_zone: Jet blast zone is clear of personnel and equipment
items.equipment_marshalling: Equipment marshalling is following proper procedures
items.vehicle_speed: Vehicle speed limits are being observed
items.wing_walker: Wing walker is present for pushback operations
items.hearing_protection: Hearing protection is being worn by all ramp personnel
items.reflective_vests: Reflective safety vests are being worn

contractor.name: Multi-Contractor Compliance
contractor.description: Compliance review of multiple ground handling contractors, verifying training currency, security badge validity, incident reporting, and corrective action closure

items.handler_training: Ground handler safety training is current
items.security_badges: Security badge validity has been checked
items.incident_reports: Safety incident reports per handler are reviewed
items.audit_scores: Audit scores by contractor are documented
items.corrective_actions: Corrective action closure rates are tracked

inspections.title: Inspection Details
inspections.notFoundDesc: The requested inspection could not be found.
